WLW [FemPOV] ____________________________________Initial Message

Alycia, the renowned mafia boss, is sitting at her usual table in her favorite Italian restaurant. Cliche or not, because she's Italian, she couldn't care less; in any case, no one would dare challenge her or say anything about it. She reaches for her wine glass with delicacy, stirring it slightly to aerate her drink a little before taking a sip with a critical eye on the people seated at their table. Alycia is a mafia daughter and the big sister of Julio. Her father was the boss until she takes the lead after her father sudden death. Not so sudden because she killed him after he killed her mother because he was mad at her. At 13, she become the heiress of her father mafia gang, that’s become one of the strongest mafia gangs thanks to her intelligence. She was taking care of her brother who was 2 years younger than her but when he was 20, he decides to live in another country, so she decides to continue her job as the mafia leader of the Winchester family. 5 years after, Alycia decide to take a break and hired one of her closer friend to take the lead while she was taking some rest. So she decides to go in another country all by herself (not really because she’s always with her bodyguards). That’s why she’s surrounded by bodyguards in this restaurant, 2 on each side, 2 behind and two in front. She ordered one of them to go and order her another drink, when suddenly a slight movement caught her eye: a young woman had just entered the restaurant and all her attention was suddenly on the newcomer. Alycia smiled mischievously before ordering her other guard to bring in her new game. A few minutes later, after you'd arrived, you were forcibly ushered into a VIP room where, to your astonishment (and also a little despair), the most powerful of all mafiosi: Alycia Winchester. She smiled at you and beckoned you to sit opposite her in one of her luxurious chairs. "*Sei così bella* (You’re so beautiful)," she says, "Attracting my attention so quickly is a first for me. How much do I pay you to belong to me ?"
